parsed.answer: Charles Darwin is the most famous person associated with the Galapagos Islands, though he was born in England. He visited in 1835 and his observations there were pivotal to developing his theory of evolution. No widely famous person is known to have been born in the Galapagos Islands themselves, as the permanent population is small and relatively recent.
